results.title: Looking To Create An AI App
results.description:
I am looking for a visionary AI Developer/Engineer to help build a custom AI application with the long-term goal of evolving it into a full-scale SaaS platform. The core functionality involves automated video and script generation. A primary technical goal is to utilize a Serverless Architecture to ensure the platform is highly scalable while keeping operational overhead at a minimum during the development and testing phases.

The Vision

Phase 1: Serverless MVP. Build a functional Minimum Viable Product using serverless functions (e.g., AWS Lambda, Vercel, or Google Cloud Functions) to handle "Script-to-Video" automation with zero idle cost.

Phase 2: Stress Testing & Optimization. Stress-test the app, squash bugs, and refine the UX while monitoring API consumption.

Phase 3: SaaS Transition. Transition the architecture into a multi-tenant SaaS platform with subscription management, user dashboards, and auto-scaling capabilities.

results.title: Senior Next.js Developer for SaaS Platform
results.description:
We're building a custom platform and internal operations platform for a digital marketing agency serving fitness studio brands. This replaces tools with a unified platform.
We need a senior developer to accelerate our launch. You'll work alongside our CTO and lead developer, building production features from detailed specs and implementation plans.

results.title: Integrate AI Assistant into SaaS Dashboard using Next.js, FastAPI, and OpenAI
results.description:
Our SaaS dashboard is built with Next.js and FastAPI. 
We want to embed an AI-powered support assistant 
that answers user questions based on our product — 
without redirecting them to external pages.

What we need:

• Floating chat widget integrated into the dashboard
• FastAPI /assistant endpoint powered by GPT-4o
• Per-user conversation memory stored in PostgreSQL
• System prompt configured to match our product scope

Current stack:
• Frontend: Next.js
• Backend: FastAPI (Python)
• Database: PostgreSQL
• AI: OpenAI API (GPT-4o)

You should know:
• Solid experience with OpenAI API
• Comfortable working inside an existing codebase
• Next.js components + FastAPI endpoints
• Readable, maintainable code

Deliverables:
• Chat widget component (drops into existing layout)
• /assistant API endpoint with user-scoped history
• Prompt configuration file
• README with setup and customization guide

results.title: SaaS Sales Representative for Nonprofit Sector
results.description:
About Us

Pathways Group is building a powerful, easy-to-use SaaS platform designed to help small businesses, nonprofits, youth organizations, and community groups operate more effectively.

Our system simplifies:
	•	Board and organizational management
	•	Customer and contact tracking (CRM)
	•	Group communication and coordination
	•	Fundraising and donation management

We serve the backbone of local communities—small businesses, sports teams, and nonprofit organizations—and give them tools typically reserved for large enterprises.

⸻

The Opportunity

We are looking for a motivated, relationship-driven Sales Representative who understands the needs of small businesses and/or nonprofits in the United States.

This is not a high-pressure, transactional sales role. It’s about helping organizations solve real problems and become more organized, efficient, and successful.

You’ll have the flexibility to shape your compensation structure based on your goals:
	•	Base + Commission
	•	Or high-percentage, performance-driven commission

⸻

What You’ll Do
	•	Identify and connect with small businesses, nonprofits, and community organizations
	•	Present and demonstrate the Pathways platform
	•	Build relationships with decision-makers (owners, board members, directors)
	•	Guide prospects through the sales process from first contact to close
	•	Follow up and nurture leads through calls, texts, and email
	•	Provide feedback to help improve the product and messaging

⸻

Who You Are
	•	Fluent in English (spoken and written)
	•	Strong communicator with a natural ability to build trust
	•	Experience in sales, small business, nonprofits, or community organizations preferred
	•	Comfortable talking with business owners, board members, and leadership teams
	•	Self-motivated and able to work independently
	•	Organized and consistent with follow-up

⸻

What Makes You a Great Fit
	•	You’ve worked with or understand:
	•	Small businesses
	•	Nonprofits or fundraising organizations
	•	Youth sports teams or community groups
	•	You can speak their language and understand their challenges
	•	You enjoy helping people—not just selling to them

⸻

Why Join Pathways Group
	•	Flexible compensation structure tailored to your goals
	•	Opportunity to grow with an early-stage, high-impact SaaS platform
	•	Meaningful work helping real organizations in your community
	•	Freedom to build your own pipeline and sales style
	•	Potential for long-term leadership or revenue share opportunities

⸻

How to Apply

Send us:
	•	A short introduction about yourself
	•	Your experience (sales, nonprofit, or business-related)
	•	Your preferred compensation structure (Base + Commission or Commission Only

results.title: AI Workflow / Backend Engineer (LLMs, RAG, Systems) for B2B SaaS
results.description:
**Role: AI Workflow / Backend Engineer for Operational B2B System**

We are building a B2B operational system that goes beyond a typical web app. This is not a standard CRUD product. The system processes real-world inputs (documents, requests, parts data), interprets them, and drives workflows forward with AI-assisted logic.

We are looking for an engineer who can work on the **core system layer**, not just UI features.

---

**What you’ll actually work on**

* Designing and improving **workflow logic (job states, transitions, resolution flows)**
* Building **AI-assisted pipelines** (ingestion → extraction → validation → action)
* Integrating **retrieval/memory systems (RAG)** into real workflows
* Implementing **backend services** that handle:

  * document parsing
  * structured data extraction
  * decision logic with confidence + fallback
* Ensuring **reliability**:

  * error handling
  * retries
  * logging / audit trails
  * data integrity

---

**Tech stack (current)**

* React (frontend already mostly built)
* Node.js / Express
* TypeScript
* PostgreSQL

You do NOT need to be a frontend expert. This role is primarily **backend + systems + AI integration**.

---

**What we are NOT looking for**

* Basic CRUD developers
* “AI wrapper” builders who only connect APIs
* No-code / automation tool specialists (Zapier, GHL, etc.)

---

**What we ARE looking for**

* Experience building **real systems**, not just features
* Strong backend thinking (data models, workflows, reliability)
* Experience with one or more:

  * Python (preferred for AI pipelines)
  * FastAPI / Node services
  * RAG systems / vector search
  * LLM integrations with structured outputs
* Ability to think in:

  * states
  * workflows
  * failure modes
  * system design

---

**Engagement structure**

We will start with a **small paid test task** focused on a real workflow problem (not a toy task).
If successful, this will lead to ongoing weekly work.

---

**Important**

When applying, please include:

1. A system you’ve built (not just a website)
2. A brief explanation of how it handled:

   * data flow
   * edge cases
   * failure/retry logic
3. Any experience with AI workflows, RAG, or automation systems

results.title: Sales Closer - Unique compensation opportunity
results.description:
Hello,

We are building AdminBox, a SaaS product that helps people never miss important emails like bills, deadlines, or contracts.

You can sell:

directly to consumers (B2C)
or through professionals (B2B2C)

👉 Up to you.

Your Role
Talk to people
Identify admin stress (missed deadlines, bills, etc.)
Introduce AdminBox
Close paying users

Compensation (Key Part)

🔥 First 20 users:

€20 per closed paying user (one-time)

🔁 After 20 users:

💰 You keep the full €19.99/month per user you close

👉 As long as the subscription stays active, you keep earning.

Important
No investment required
Not MLM
No recruiting others

This is direct sales of a real SaaS product.

To Apply

Send:

your motivation
any relevant experience
how you would approach your first users

Thank you.

results.title: 🧑‍💻 Senior PHP (Laravel) Developer – Architecture & Backend Expert
results.description:
Job Description

We are looking for a Senior PHP Developer with strong expertise in Laravel, MySQL, and backend architecture design to join our team.

The ideal candidate should have experience building scalable, production-grade systems, and be comfortable working across backend, frontend (basic), and server-level environments.

🌍 Location Preference

We are specifically looking for developers based in:

Philippines
South America (Brazil, Argentina, Colombia, etc.)
🔧 Key Responsibilities
Design and develop scalable backend systems using Laravel
Architect and improve existing system structure and performance
Optimize database queries and data models (MySQL)
Work on API development and integrations
Handle server-level tasks (deployment, debugging, performance tuning)
Collaborate with team on feature planning and technical decisions
Ensure clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
🛠️ Required Skills
Strong experience in PHP & Laravel (5+ years preferred)
Expertise in MySQL (query optimization, indexing, schema design)
Good knowledge of Tailwind CSS, HTML, CSS
Experience with REST APIs and system integrations
Strong understanding of system architecture and scalability
Experience with server environments (Linux, AWS, or similar)
Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines
⭐ Nice to Have
Experience with high-traffic systems / SaaS products
Knowledge of Docker / DevOps workflows
Experience in performance optimization and caching strategies
🧠 What We’re Looking For
Someone who can think architecturally, not just code
Ability to identify bottlenecks and suggest improvements
Strong problem-solving and ownership mindset
Good communication and ability to work independently
📌 Project Details
Long-term opportunity
Ongoing feature development + system improvements
Flexible working hours

results.title: Full-Stack Web Developer Needed – Dynamic, Production-Ready Website for Software Development Company
results.description:
🖥️ JOB TITLE: Full-Stack Web Developer Needed – Dynamic, Production-Ready Website for Software Development Company

---

📌 ABOUT METAVAUX LLC

Metavaux LLC is a US-based software development company delivering custom software development, proprietary SaaS products, managed IT infrastructure, cloud services, and cybersecurity solutions to businesses across the US and internationally. We operate at the intersection of engineering excellence and business performance — and our website must reflect that.

---

📋 PROJECT OVERVIEW

We currently have a high-fidelity HTML/CSS prototype of our website and we need an experienced full-stack developer to transform it into a fully dynamic, production-ready website. The design language, brand identity, and content structure are already established. Your job is to bring it to life with a proper CMS, backend functionality, animations, and deployment.

---

✅ SCOPE OF WORK

1. FRONTEND DEVELOPMENT
- Pixel-perfect conversion of our existing HTML/CSS prototype into a fully responsive, dynamic website
- Smooth scroll animations and micro-interactions (fade-ins, hover states, counters)
- Fully mobile-responsive across all screen sizes and devices
- Cross-browser compatibility (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge)
- Performance optimized (Lighthouse score 90+)

2. CMS INTEGRATION
- Integrate a headless or traditional CMS (Contentful, Sanity, or WordPress — open to recommendation)
- Blog/Insights section with full CRUD capability
- Case Studies section manageable without developer involvement
- Services and Products pages editable via CMS

3. BACKEND & FORMS
- Fully functional Contact Form with email notifications (name, company, email, service interest, message)
- Form validation and spam protection (reCAPTCHA or equivalent)
- Backend API or serverless functions as needed

4. PAGES REQUIRED
- Home (Hero, Services, Why Us, Solutions, Process, Industries, CTA, Contact)
- About Us (Company story, Team, Values)
- Services (individual pages per service)
- Products / SaaS Solutions
- Case Studies
- Blog / Insights
- Careers
- Contact
- Legal pages (Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Cookie Policy)

5. INTEGRATIONS
- Google Analytics 4
- LinkedIn and GitHub social links
- Cookie consent banner (GDPR compliant)
- Optional: CRM integration (HubSpot or similar)

6. SECURITY & COMPLIANCE
- SSL/HTTPS configured
- SOC 2 and ISO 27001 compliance messaging maintained throughout
- Basic security headers and best practices implemented

7. DEPLOYMENT
- Deploy to production hosting (Vercel, Netlify, AWS, or equivalent)
- Domain configuration at metavauxllc.com
- CI/CD pipeline setup for future updates

---

🛠️ TECH STACK PREFERENCES
(Open to discussion — suggest what best fits the scope)
- Frontend: Next.js or React
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- CMS: Contentful, Sanity, or WordPress Headless
- Hosting: Vercel, Netlify, or AWS Amplify
- Forms: EmailJS, Resend, or custom API

---

📦 DELIVERABLES
- Fully deployed, live production website
- Clean, documented codebase pushed to a private GitHub repository
- CMS configured with initial content loaded
- Admin access and handover documentation
- 30-day post-launch support for bug fixes

---

🎯 IDEAL CANDIDATE
- 4+ years of full-stack web development experience
- Strong portfolio of dynamic business/SaaS websites
- Experience with headless CMS platforms
- Eye for design detail — our brand is premium and technical
- Strong communication and ability to meet deadlines
- Bonus: experience building websites for tech or software companies

---

📊 PROJECT DETAILS
- Project Type: Fixed Price (open to milestone-based)
- Timeline: 4–6 weeks
- Budget: $2,500 – $6,000 (depending on experience and proposed approach)
- Start Date: Immediately upon hire

---

📩 TO APPLY — PLEASE INCLUDE:
1. Link to 2–3 relevant websites you have built (similar scope)
2. Your proposed tech stack and a brief approach to this project
3. Your estimated timeline broken down by milestone
4. Your fixed price or milestone-based quote

results.title: AWS Founding DevOps Engineer — Compliance SaaS Platform
results.description:
🚀 Hiring: AWS Founding DevOps Engineer — Compliance SaaS Platform

I am the founder of Govara (govara.io), a compliance verification and trust infrastructure platform currently in UAT and preparing for production deployment. I am looking for an experienced AWS DevOps engineer to join as our founding infrastructure person — someone who wants to be part of building something from the ground up and is in it for the long haul.

This is not a one-off contract. This is not a short term gig. I am looking for someone who wants to grow with the product, be part of the day to day operation, and take real ownership of our infrastructure as we scale from pre-launch to a live, revenue-generating platform.

This is not a co-founder role and not a backend development role. It is a focused infrastructure role for someone who is excellent at what they do, communicates clearly every day, and takes pride in keeping a serious product running securely and reliably.

What you will own:

AWS environment management (ECS, ALB), Docker and containerization, CI/CD pipeline setup and maintenance, IAM and access control with least privilege and environment separation, deployment management across staging, UAT, and production environments, monitoring and alerting, and overall infrastructure security posture. This is a compliance platform handling sensitive client data — infrastructure security is not optional and will be taken seriously.

What you will not own:

Application code belongs to our backend developer. You will not have merge rights on the application repository and will not be involved in product or business decisions.

The stack:

AWS (ECS and ALB), Docker, Python and Django backend, GitHub.

What I am looking for:

Proven AWS ECS experience is non-negotiable. You need strong Docker knowledge, CI/CD pipeline experience, and a security-first mindset — you understand least privilege, IAM best practices, and segregation of duties. Most importantly I need someone who communicates clearly and consistently. I am a non-technical founder and I need a DevOps partner who flags issues early, explains what they are doing, and shows up every day. If you go dark for days at a time this is not the right fit. Day to day communication is a core part of this role, not an afterthought.

Engagement details:

Fractional contractor at approximately 5 to 15 hours per week with the expectation of growing into a longer term role as the product scales.

About Govara:

Govara is a compliance verification and trust infrastructure platform purpose-built for AI governance and security compliance. We cover ISO 42001, ISO 27001, GDPR, EU AI Act, and NIST AI RMF. We are pre-launch and moving toward production deployment. The platform is architecturally built, the commercial model is defined, and we are focused on getting across the finish line and into the hands of paying clients. You would be joining at the most exciting stage — early enough to shape how the infrastructure is built, late enough that the product is real.

To apply:

Send a short message with your AWS and ECS experience, a brief description of a relevant project you have worked on, and your availability. Thank you very much!
